subject: fix(theme): replace all hardcoded colors with DaisyUI semantic references
body:
Remove every hardcoded hex color and rgba() value from CSS and TSX files
(except DebugPill which intentionally uses its own React root). All colors
now reference DaisyUI CSS variables via var() or color-mix(in oklab, ...).

Cytoscape styles read computed DaisyUI values from the DOM at runtime via
getCSSColor() instead of hardcoding dark/light color pairs. LABEL_COLORS
and COMPONENT_COLORS palettes remain as literal hex (Cytoscape requires
literal values and DaisyUI doesn't provide data visualization palettes).

CSS files: rgba(r,g,b,a) → color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-*) N%, transparent)
TSX files: hex fallbacks → getCSSColor('--color-*', fallback)
QueryBuilder.css: dual-query #3b82f6/#10b981 → var(--color-info)/var(--color-success)

Tags: theme, daisyui, colors, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
